name: RealtimeDisplayMode
summary: Base class for implementing real-time display modes in .NET. Pay special attention that in StartRenderer the RenderWindow.SetSize() function is called if the implementation relies on the RenderWindow to do the drawing to the viewport. If i.e. OpenGL is used to draw render results to the viewport then SetSize() doesn't have to be called, nor should the implementation then access channels on the RenderWindow, as those then don't exist. For OpenGL-based drawing the RenderWindow is used as a container for ViewInfo management, nothing else.

constructors.name: RealtimeDisplayMode
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RealtimeDisplayMode class

methods.name: CaptureProgress
methods.summary: Override to communicate the progress of a capture.

returns.doc: A number between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive. 1.0 means 100%.

methods.name: ComputeViewportCrc
methods.summary: Compute viewport CRC for the given ViewInfo

returns.doc: the CRC for the given view

methods.name: CreateWorld
methods.signature: public virtual void CreateWorld(RhinoDoc doc, ViewInfo viewInfo, DisplayPipelineAttributes displayPipelineAttributes)
methods.summary: Implement if you need to handle the initial CreateWorld call initiated by the display pipeline system. Note that this is not the same as the CreateWorld call in Rhino.Render.ChangeQueue.ChangeQueue, although related.

methods.name: GetRealtimeViewport(IntPtr)
methods.summary: Retrieve RealtimeDisplayMode instance that the IntPtr refers to.

params.name: realtimeViewport
params.doc: IntPtr of the instance searched for. If the instance doesn't exist, a new one is created.

methods.name: GetRealtimeViewport(IntPtr, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static RealtimeDisplayMode GetRealtimeViewport(IntPtr realtimeViewport, bool create)
methods.summary: Retrieve RealtimeDisplayMode instance. If create is set to true then a new instance is created if not found, null is returned for false.

params.name: create
params.doc: true to create if not found, false to return null if not found.

methods.name: GetRenderSize
methods.signature: public abstract void GetRenderSize(out int width, out int height)
methods.summary: Get the current render resolution for the running render session.

methods.name: GetView
methods.summary: Get ViewInfo that has been registered with this RealtimeDisplayMode instance.

methods.name: HudAllowEditMaxPasses
methods.summary: Override to allow maximum pass editing. By default disabled.

returns.doc: Return true to allow users to edit the maximum pass count.

methods.name: HudCustomStatusText
methods.summary: Override to display status of the render engine.

methods.name: HudLastRenderedPass
methods.summary: Override to communicate the last completed pass. Can be shown in the HUD

methods.name: HudMaximumPasses
methods.summary: Override to communicate the maximum passes count currently in use for the render session. Can be shown in the HUD

methods.name: HudProductName
methods.summary: Override to return the name of your product. This will be printed in the HUD.

methods.name: HudRendererLocked
methods.summary: Implement to support locking in the viewport

returns.doc: Return true if the render engine is locked.

methods.name: HudRendererPaused
methods.summary: Implement to support pausing and resuming in the viewport

returns.doc: Return true if the render engine is paused.

methods.name: HudShow
methods.summary: Override if you want to hide the HUD. Shown by default

returns.doc: Return false to hide the HUD.

methods.name: HudShowControls
methods.summary: Show control buttons on the realtime display HUD. By default these are shown, override this function and return false if HUD controls aren't needed.

methods.name: HudShowCustomStatusText
methods.summary: Override to show status text in HUD. By default disabled.

returns.doc: Return true to show status text in HUD

methods.name: HudShowMaxPasses
methods.summary: Override to show maximum passes in HUD. By default disabled.

returns.doc: Return true to show maximum passes.

methods.name: HudShowPasses
methods.summary: Override to show current pass in HUD. By default disabled.

returns.doc: Return true to show current pass in HUD.

methods.name: IsCompleted
methods.summary: Implement to tell if your render engine has completed a frame for drawing into the viewport

methods.name: IsFrameBufferAvailable
methods.summary: Implement to tell the render pipeline that a framebuffer is ready

returns.doc: Return true when a framebuffer is ready. This is generally the case when StartRenderer as returned successfully.

methods.name: IsRendererStarted
methods.summary: Override to tell the started state of your render engine.

returns.doc: true if render engine is ready and rendering

methods.name: LastRenderedPass
methods.summary: Implement to communicate last completed pass to the underlying system.

methods.name: OnRenderSizeChanged
methods.signature: public virtual bool OnRenderSizeChanged(int width, int height)
methods.summary: Override to restart your render engine

methods.name: PostConstruct
methods.summary: Override PostConstruct if you need to initialize where the underlying RealtimeDisplayMode is available. The connection is made right after RealtimeDisplayMode has been instantiated, but just before PostConstruct is called. For instance finding out OpenGL information can be done in PostConstruct.

methods.name: RegisterDisplayModes(PlugIn)
methods.summary: Find and register classes that derive from RealtimeDisplayMode from the given plug-in.

methods.name: RegisterDisplayModes(Assembly, Guid)
methods.signature: public static RealtimeDisplayModeClassInfo[] RegisterDisplayModes(Assembly assembly, Guid pluginId)
methods.summary: Find and register classes that derive from RealtimeDisplayMode from the given plug-in. The plug-in is found in the given assembly

methods.name: RemoveRealtimeViewport
methods.summary: Remove RealtimeDisplayMode instance from internal dictionary.

params.name: realtimeViewport
params.doc: IntPtr to the RealtimeDisplayMode instance to remove.

methods.name: SetUseDrawOpenGl
methods.summary: During run-time change whether to use OpenGL drawing of results or not. For instance offline rendering (viewcapture* with different resolution than viewport) could use RenderWindow instead of direct OpenGL drawing.

params.name: use
params.doc: Set to true if OpenGL drawing is wanted, set to false if RenderWindow method is needed.

methods.name: SetView
methods.summary: Set ViewInfo for this RealtimeDisplayMode instance.

params.name: view
params.doc: The ViewInfo to set for subsequent tests.

methods.name: ShowCaptureProgress
methods.summary: Override if you want to i.e. hide the progress dialog for capture progress.

returns.doc: Return true to show, false to hide

methods.name: ShutdownRenderer
methods.summary: Override to shutdown your render engine

methods.name: SignalRedraw
methods.summary: Use to signal the underlying pipeline a redraw is wanted. This can be used for instance when a renderer has completed a pass which should be updated in the associated viewport.

methods.name: StartRenderer
methods.signature: public abstract bool StartRenderer(int w, int h, RhinoDoc doc, ViewInfo view, ViewportInfo viewportInfo, bool forCapture, RenderWindow renderWindow)
methods.summary: Override to start your render engine. Note that before using the RenderWindow you *must* call SetSize to properly initialize the underlying DIB.

params.name: forCapture
params.doc: true if renderer is started for capture purposes (ViewCaptureTo*), false for regular interactive rendering

params.name: renderWindow
params.doc: RenderWindow to hold render results in.

returns.doc: Return true when your render engine started correctly, false when that failed

methods.name: UnregisterDisplayModes(Assembly, Guid)
methods.signature: public static void UnregisterDisplayModes(Assembly assembly, Guid pluginId)

methods.name: UseFastDraw
methods.summary: Implement and return true if you want the display pipeline to not wait for IsFramebufferAvailable during the MiddleGround draw phase. This will also tell the pipeline to draw a complete middleground pass in OpenGL.

properties.name: LinearWorkflow
properties.summary: Returns the LinearWorkflow data for this realtime display mode.

events.name: HudLockButtonPressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDLockButtonLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudLockButtonPressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle the lock button control

events.name: HudPauseButtonPressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDPauseButtonLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudPauseButtonPressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle the pause button control

events.name: HudPlayButtonPressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDPlayButtonLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudPlayButtonPressed
events.summary: Listen to this event if you want to handle the play button control.

events.name: HudProductNamePressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDProductNameLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudProductNamePressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle a press on the product name component

events.name: HudStatusTextPressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDStatusTextLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudStatusTextPressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle a press on the status text component

events.name: HudTimePressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDTimeLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudTimePressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle a press press on the time component

events.name: HudUnlockButtonPressed
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use HUDUnlockButtonLeftClicked instead")] public event EventHandler HudUnlockButtonPressed
events.summary: Listen tot his event if you want to handle the unlock button control

events.name: MaxPassesChanged
events.summary: Listen to this if you want to handle changes in maximum pass count through the HUD.
